log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Autognome — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:9+9=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 30 damage. Autognome — Winged Striker HP: 37/67
--- Autognome — Winged Striker --- HP: 37/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Autognome — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:10+9=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 27 damage. Autognome — Winged Striker HP: 10/67
--- Autognome — Winged Striker --- HP: 10/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (10/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Autognome — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Autognome — Winged Striker.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Autognome — Winged Striker.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Autognome — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:7+9=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 33 damage. Autognome — Winged Striker HP: -23/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Autognome — Winged Striker.
